title: Dasynema obtusum
taxonomy: Dasynema obtusum is classified as a species of fungus, specifically within the phylum Ascomycota and the order Pleurotales. It belongs to the family Tricholomataceae. Dasynema obtusum is a type of mushroom that grows on trees and decaying organic matter. This species is known to be saprotrophic, obtaining its nutrients by breaking down dead plant material. Further research may be needed to confirm its exact classification within the fungal kingdom.
uses: Dasynema obtusum, a species of fungus, has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits.
